creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Build fails due to bsd.apache.mk comparison

cd /usr/ports/textproc/htdig && make

"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.apache.mk", line 306: warning: String comparison operator should be either == or !=
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.apache.mk", line 306: Malformed conditional (!empty(_APACHE_VERSION_MINIMUM) && (${_APACHE_VERSION} < ${_APACHE_VERSION_MINIMUM}))
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk", line 6603: if-less endif
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/textproc/htdig && make
